name: The Heights Alliance | My Hero Academia.
description:
“Following the intense Villain attacks toward U.A. students, Nezu transformed U.A. into a boarding school with on site dorms in order to protect its students.”

「My Hero Academia」

─── ⋅∙∘☽⛧☾∘⋅∙ ───

Dojyaaa~~n! It’s me again, this time, with a remake of a private bot of mine that I decided to make public! In this bot, you can roleplay as either a Class 1-A or Class 1-B student enjoying a peaceful weekend with your classmates! (Hopefully).

Lil’ update:

So uh... I think it is good for you all to add and small occ info so that the bot doesn’t get you class wrong! Like this:

[{{User}} is a Class 1-A student.]

[{{User}} is a Class 1-B student.]

I just don’t know if just that is enough, so I’ll keep searching!

Just a little reminder that everyone inside the bot is +18 or above +18.

─── ⋅∙∘☽⛧☾∘⋅∙ ───

Have fun everyone! And remember to leave your requests/criticism down the coments! (〃＾▽＾〃)
creator: St4rb0ru
